§6Pyrolysis Oven§f

§aLate-game thermal processor — produces fullerene, fine soot, and efficient solid fuel from petroleum byproducts!§f

The §bPyrolysis Oven§f is a mid-to-late game machine that processes items with optional fluid inputs to produce solid and/or fluid outputs. It is functionally similar to the Combination Oven but is post-RBMK and post-Vacuum Refinery, requiring §bCrystalline Fullerite§f and §bFine Soot§f to craft.

§6Crafting§f (Assembly Machine):
§b• §e16×§f Welded Steel Plate
§b• §e16×§f PVC Bar
§b• §e4×§f Crystalline Fullerite
§b• §e12×§f Copper Pipe
§b• §e1×§f Desh Motor
§b• §e1×§f Versatile Circuit Board

§6Key Recipes§f:
§b• Fine Soot§f: §e4×§f Coal Tar → Fine Soot + §e1,000mB§f CO₂ (eliminates smokestack RNG).
§b• Solid Fuel§f: Much more efficient than solidification machine — §e300mB§f Reformate vs §e750mB§f.
§b• Liquid Hydrogen§f: §e12,000mB§f Natural Gas → §e8,000mB§f LH + Graphite Ingot.
§b• Coal Gasoline§f: Heavy Oil + Coal/Coal Powder/Petroleum Coke → §e1,000mB§f Coal Gasoline.
§b• Syngas§f: Coal processing.
§b• Wood Oil§f: Wood processing → Wood Oil.

§eTip§f: The Pyrolysis Oven is the primary machine for §bCrystalline Fullerite§f production. Since it requires crystalline fullerite to craft, you need an initial supply from another source (such as explosive processing) before you can build your first one!
